summary.title: 发布 pi-router 0.3.2
summary.what: 为 pi-router 执行补丁版本发布准备：将包版本从 0.3.1 提升到 0.3.2，更新 package.json 与 package-lock.json，更新 index.ts 中对外显示的版本字符串，并在 CHANGELOG.md 增加 0.3.2 发布说明。随后完成发布前校验，为 git push 与 npm publish 做好准备。
summary.why: npm registry 上已经存在 pi-router@0.3.1，不能重复发布同版本。为了交付本轮补测与修复成果，需要创建一个新的可发布补丁版本。

decisions.rationale: 0.3.1 已经在 npm 上存在，同版本 publish 会失败；本轮变更属于向后兼容的补丁发布。

decisions.chose: 执行 typecheck、build、全量测试和 dry-run 打包检查
decisions.rationale: 这是最小但足够的发布前验证集合，可以同时确认源码、测试与 npm 包内容一致可用。

rejected.alternative: 在不改版本号的情况下直接 npm publish
rejected.reason: registry 已有 0.3.1，发布会被拒绝。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 本次 push 与 package publish 均来自用户明确要求，而非代理自主越界执行。

review_notes: 发布前检查通过：npm run typecheck、npm run build、npm test -- --run（64 passed）、npm pack --dry-run --json。
本 intent 与之前的 router 修复/补测 intents 存在共享文件 overlap，但语义上是对已完成成果进行补丁版本发布，属于后续交付动作。

behavioral_changes: 对外发布版本号由 0.3.1 变为 0.3.2。

data_model_changes.name: package version
data_model_changes.migration_notes: 仅补丁版本提升，无配置迁移要求。

migration_notes: 无迁移要求；消费者升级到 0.3.2 即可获得本轮修复与测试覆盖。

intents.goal: 整理并提交 pi-router 路由修复

summary.title: 整理并提交 pi-router 路由修复
summary.what: 完成 pi-router 的路由可靠性、配置向导、缓存、打包与文档收口：接入真实 provider streamSimple 与上游鉴权，增强 channelFirst/custom 路由、auto router、sticky、footer、/router config order、OAuth/modelOverrides 发现、候选过滤、fallback 摘要与健康/熔断观测，并根据深度审查补齐配置热刷新、fallback relay 缓冲、mtime 缓存失效、peerDependencies 和发布清单修复。
summary.why: 用户需要 pi-router 在真实 pi 运行时稳定代理多 provider 模型并能快速调整路由顺序，同时避免旧配置闭包、未登录 provider 混入、fallback 半截输出泄露、核心 pi 包副本分裂和 npm 包缺源文件等问题。
summary.user_goal: 整理并提交 pi-router 路由修复

decisions.point: router provider dispatch 与上游鉴权
decisions.chose: 使用专用 pi-router API 触发自定义 streamSimple，并在转发真实 provider 前剥离 router dummy apiKey、通过 modelRegistry 解析真实 auth/header。
decisions.rationale: 避免 router 伪 provider 递归或把 dummy key 传给上游导致 401，同时保留 pi-ai provider registry 的真实流式能力。
rejected: 直接把 router provider 当普通上游 provider 透传

decisions.chose: 维护单一当前配置引用，save/refresh/命令/路由入口共用，并让 models/auth/modelMap 缓存按 mtime 与 TTL 失效。
decisions.rationale: 跨终端修改 pi-router.json 或 models.json 后，同一进程内的命令和实际路由必须尽快看到新顺序、新渠道和认证状态。
rejected: 继续依赖启动时闭包 config
仅使用固定 60 秒 TTL 判断模型缓存

decisions.chose: fallback 模型复用主链路 relayProviderStream 的缓冲/commit 语义。
decisions.rationale: 未提交事件失败时可以安全尝试下一个 fallback；一旦内容已提交，就不再混入其他模型输出。
rejected: fallback 直接 for-await 后立即 push 每个上游事件

decisions.chose: 按用户确认保留现有默认启用 rightAlignRoute 的代码行为，仅修正文案注释使其与代码一致。
decisions.rationale: 用户明确说明 footer 当前运行行为正确，审查发现的是注释与代码不一致。

decisions.chose: 将 @earendil-works/pi-ai 与 @earendil-works/pi-tui 放入 peerDependencies，同时保留 devDependencies 供测试。
decisions.rationale: pi 核心包应由宿主提供，避免扩展安装自己的副本造成 registry/TUI 状态分裂。
rejected: 继续把 pi-ai/pi-tui 作为运行时 dependencies

review_notes: 验证通过：npm run build、npm test（42 passed）、npm run test:coverage、npm pack --dry-run --json。
本次最终提交为 43af325 fix: address router review findings；未推送远端，按 handoff 边界停在本地提交。
仓库当前 .ml-cache/views 会被 Mainline 命令刷新为脏状态，seal 使用 --allow-dirty 仅记录该运行时视图缓存脏状态。

architectural_claims: pi-router exposes router/auto and router/<model> mirror models using a dedicated pi-router API dispatch seam.
Routing failover uses buffered stream relay semantics so uncommitted upstream events can be discarded safely before trying another channel.
Configuration and model discovery are process-local cached but invalidated by relevant file mtimes.
behavioral_changes: router requests and /router commands see refreshed pi-router.json after disk changes.
fallback routes no longer leak pre-commit start/text_start events from failed fallback streams.
/router config order preserves configured real channels that are temporarily unavailable while still excluding router pseudo channels.
summary generation uses the same authenticated upstream forwarding path as normal requests.
models.json/auth.json changes invalidate model and modelMap caches without waiting for TTL.

data_model_changes.name: pi-router.json stickyRecords/current routing config handling
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing config files continue to load; comments and defaults are JSON-safe.

data_model_changes.name: package-lock peer/dev dependency layout
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Runtime pi core packages are expected from host peer dependencies; local dev still installs them.

security_implications: Dropping the router dummy apiKey before upstream auth prevents accidental credential misuse against real providers.
Filtering router pseudo providers from model maps/order candidates avoids recursive self-routing.
migration_notes: Users do not need to rewrite existing pi-router.json configs.
Package consumers should install under a pi version that satisfies the declared peer dependencies.

intents.goal: 继续修复 pi-router 配置持久化与 footer 默认行为文档

summary.title: 继续修复 pi-router 配置持久化与 footer 默认行为文档
summary.what: 补齐 pi-router 配置写回与 footer 文档的一致性：保存带 JSON-safe 注释的配置时保留 auto、request、footer、stickyRecords、intent 等高级字段；明确 footer.rightAlignRoute 默认启用并以当前代码行为为准；实现 footer.statusLine=false 对内置状态行 fallback 的抑制；同步 README、README.zh-CN、生成的 pi-router.README.md 字段说明和 CHANGELOG，并新增回归测试覆盖高级配置字段保存。
summary.why: 上一轮审查修复后仍存在两个容易回归的问题：footer 默认行为的注释/文档不够明确，容易被误改成 opt-in；saveConfig/addConfigComments 在写配置注释时会丢弃高级选项和 sticky 运行时记录，导致用户手动配置或粘性路由状态在后续保存中丢失。
summary.user_goal: 继续修复 pi-router 配置持久化与 footer 默认行为文档

decisions.chose: 保留 footer.rightAlignRoute 默认 true 的现有代码行为，只修正文案并补充显式默认说明。
decisions.rationale: 用户明确说明当前运行行为正确，问题在注释与默认语义表达；改代码默认会破坏已验证行为。
rejected: 把 footer.rightAlignRoute 改成默认 false 或 opt-in

decisions.chose: addConfigComments 继续输出 JSON-safe 注释，同时保留 auto、request、footer、stickyRecords、intent 等已知高级字段。
decisions.rationale: 这些字段影响路由注册、请求控制、footer 布局和粘性路由；保存 sticky 或向导结果时不应静默丢失用户配置。
rejected: 只保留常用字段并丢弃高级字段

decisions.chose: 将 statusLine=false 实现为在禁用替换 footer 时抑制内置 setStatus fallback。
decisions.rationale: 类型中已有该字段，之前只有注释没有实际效果；补齐实现后文档、类型与运行行为一致。

review_notes: 与既有 proposed intent int_02cc3872 文件/目标重叠；已检查并分类为同一分支上的互补 follow-up，不改变上一轮已确认的 footer 默认行为。
验证通过：npm run build、npm run typecheck、npm test -- --run（43 passed）、npm run test:coverage、npm pack --dry-run --json。
提交为 b082baf fix: preserve router config options；未推送远端，按 handoff 边界停止。
Mainline 运行时 .ml-cache/views 保持脏状态，seal 使用 --allow-dirty 仅记录运行时视图缓存脏状态。

architectural_claims: pi-router config saves are JSON-commented but must preserve behavior-affecting advanced fields.
footer.rightAlignRoute remains default-enabled; footer.statusLine only controls the built-in status fallback when replacement footer is disabled.
behavioral_changes: saveConfig preserves auto, request, footer, stickyRecords, and intent when writing pi-router.json.
footer.statusLine=false now suppresses the built-in pi-router status item when footer replacement is disabled.
generated pi-router.README.md documents auto, request, and footer defaults for manual editing.

data_model_changes.name: pi-router.json persisted config fields
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing configs continue to load; future saves preserve additional known fields instead of dropping them.

migration_notes: Users who previously lost footer/request/sticky settings after a save can re-add them; future saves preserve them.

intents.goal: 按 TDD 补齐 pi-router 测试覆盖

summary.title: Expand pi-router behavior coverage with TDD
summary.what: Added behavior-focused regression and integration tests for pi-router routing, config wizard flows, editor interactions, provider/model loading, config persistence, cooldown/failover, committed-stream safety, and fallback summary transfer. The TDD cycles also fixed two discovered correctness issues: explicit provider models now override provider-level headers/compat, and auth-only provider discovery no longer re-adds a provider explicitly disabled with models: []. Updated ARCHITECTURE.md testing status to reflect the covered unit/integration paths.
summary.why: The project is TDD-driven and the existing router/config/footer fixes needed executable behavioral coverage instead of relying on manual validation or comments. The added tests cover the previously documented Testing Strategy TODOs and guard the recent failover/config behavior from regressions.
summary.user_goal: 按 TDD 补齐 pi-router 测试覆盖

decisions.chose: Use behavior/integration tests through exported helpers, real editor handleInput paths, and stream provider registration rather than mocking private internals.
decisions.rationale: This follows the project TDD preference and keeps tests focused on observable router behavior that should survive refactors.
rejected: Mechanical line-coverage tests for private UI/router internals
Bulk horizontal test writing without red-green feedback

decisions.chose: Treat explicit provider.models entries as model-level overrides for headers/compat over provider defaults.
decisions.rationale: The new test exposed that provider-level values were incorrectly overwriting model-specific values; model-specific configuration should be the narrower and higher-precedence source.
rejected: Keep provider-level headers/compat overriding explicit model settings

decisions.point: Auth-only provider discovery versus explicit disable
decisions.chose: Only auto-fill auth-only builtin providers when the provider is absent from models.json; preserve explicit models: [] disables.
decisions.rationale: A user-declared provider entry in models.json is intentional configuration, and auth.json should not undo an explicit disable.
rejected: Re-add any auth provider that produced no expanded models

decisions.chose: Export determineChannelOrder for behavior tests alongside existing test helpers.
decisions.rationale: Channel order is documented strategy behavior and needed direct public-style coverage for sticky/latency/cost rules.

rejected.alternative: Stop after coverage reporting without fixing RED findings
rejected.reason: The TDD cycles revealed real behavior bugs that would leave the new regression tests failing.
They are generated cache noise and not source changes.

acknowledged_constraints.note: This testing pass did not change the confirmed footer runtime default; rightAlignRoute remains enabled unless explicitly false.
Work proceeded in incremental red-green slices; two RED tests drove implementation fixes before final all-green validation.

review_notes: Final validation passed: npm run typecheck, npm run build, npm test -- --run, and npm run test:coverage.
Test count increased to 64 passing tests across 3 files.
Coverage improved to total statements 54.63%, branches 44.78%, functions 60.04%, lines 55.43%; config wizard editor modules now have 100% function coverage for flat/two-tier editors.

Mainline preflight still reports overlap with previous proposed intent int_02cc3872 because this is a follow-up on the same router repair line; this was inspected as complementary rather than a semantic conflict.
Source changes were committed locally as ef690a3 test: expand router behavior coverage; remaining dirty files are only .ml-cache/views runtime cache.

architectural_claims: Router behavior is now guarded by behavior-level tests for channel order, circuit breaker, latency sorting, context sanitization, failover, fallback summary transfer, cooldown skip/expiry, and stream commit safety.
Config wizard ordering and completion paths are covered through both queued result tests and keyboard-driven component interaction tests.
Provider/model expansion tests now document precedence and explicit-disable semantics.
behavioral_changes: Explicit model headers and compat now override provider-level defaults during provider.models expansion.
Auth-only discovery no longer re-adds providers explicitly declared in models.json, preserving models: [] as an intentional disable.
No intended change to footer default behavior or routing runtime defaults beyond the two regression fixes.

data_model_changes.name: models.json providers.<name>.models: [] semantics
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing explicit empty model arrays now remain disabled even when the same provider appears in auth.json.

security_implications: No new auth surfaces. Header merge precedence now better respects model-specific overrides, which can avoid accidental propagation of provider-default headers to models that override them.
migration_notes: No migration required. Users who intentionally set models: [] get the documented disabling behavior even with auth.json entries present.
